name: ml-gutenberg-customizations
description: Custom margin and padding controls for mobile screens in the WordPress Gutenberg editor.

scripts.build: npm run test && wp-scripts build && npm run zip
scripts.zip: rm -rf /tmp/ml-gutenberg-customizations && mkdir -p /tmp/ml-gutenberg-customizations && cp ml-gutenberg-customizations.php /tmp/ml-gutenberg-customizations/ && cp -r build /tmp/ml-gutenberg-customizations/ && cd /tmp && rm -f ml-gutenberg-customizations.zip && zip -r ml-gutenberg-customizations.zip ml-gutenberg-customizations/ -x 'ml-gutenberg-customizations/build/*.map' && mv ml-gutenberg-customizations.zip "$OLDPWD/" && rm -rf ml-gutenberg-customizations
scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:php
